content: Senior engineer portfolios converge on: 3-6 projects each framed as a mini case study (problem, approach, stack, measurable outcome, e.g. 'cut p95 latency 800ms->120ms' beats generic descriptions); one-line positioning statement; experience/employers; skills/stack; contact + resume link. Recruiters scan in ~6-8 seconds so top projects with role+stack must be visible without scrolling. Dark theme + monospace accents + zero clutter reads as recruiter-friendly.
